_comment: Recommended baseline Claude Code permissions — a SAFE, conservative default. Copy the `permissions` object into your own ~/.claude/settings.json (global) or a project .claude/settings.json, MERGING with any permissions you already have. Precedence is deny > ask > allow. This is a hand-copied template, not an auto-installed file, and it contains NO secrets/paths. See README 'Recommended permissions' for optional add-on groups (build tools, language runtimes, file-mutation, etc.) you can opt into. Remove this _comment key before use (settings.json is strict JSON).
